INTEGRITY HC OF HERRIN

CCN: 146092 · HERRIN, IL 62948 · Williamson County

Overview

Address
1900 NORTH PARK AVENUE, HERRIN, IL 62948
Phone
6189422525

Ownership

Provider type

Medicare/Medicaid since
2005-10-20
Setting
Rural
2 /5
★★★★★
CMS Overall Rating

CMS 5-Star Ratings

CMS rates every Medicare/Medicaid-certified nursing home on four domains. The Overall rating is driven primarily by Health Inspection results, then adjusted up or down by Staffing and Quality Measures.

Overall Rating
Composite of Health Inspection, Staffing, and Quality Measures.
★★★★★ 2/5
Health Inspection
Based on the three most recent standard surveys, with more weight on recent results.
★★★★★ 3/5
Staffing
Weighted combination of RN and total nurse staffing hours per resident per day, case-mix adjusted.
★★★★★ 2/5
Quality Measures
15 resident-level quality measures split between long-stay and short-stay (post-acute) residents.
★★★★★ 1/5
Quality Measures breakdown
Long-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 1/5
Short-Stay Quality Measures — Data not available.

Staffing & Workforce

Direct-care staffing is the strongest operational driver of quality in nursing homes. Values are hours per resident per day, derived from payroll-based journal (PBJ) submissions. "Case-mix" adjusts for resident acuity; "Adjusted" is the CMS rating-input value.

Role Reported Case-mix expected Adjusted Federal floor
Total nurse
All nursing staff combined: RN + LPN + Aide
 3.33 3.54 3.63 ≥ 3.48 Below floor
Registered Nurse (RN)
Licensed RN hours. Strongest driver of clinical outcomes.
 0.54 0.62 0.59 ≥ 0.55 Below floor
Licensed Practical Nurse (LPN)
LPN/LVN hours. Often handles medication administration.
 0.73 0.79 0.80 —
Nurse aide
CNA hours. Bulk of direct resident care — bathing, feeding, mobility.
 2.06 2.13 2.25 —
Licensed (RN + LPN)
Combined licensed nurse coverage.
 1.27 — — —
Physical therapist
Rehabilitation therapist hours — important for post-acute / rehab admissions.
 0.02 — — —

Federal minimums (phasing in under the CMS 2024 minimum staffing rule) shown for reference. RN: 0.55 hrs/resident/day. Total nurse: 3.48 hrs/resident/day.

Weekend staffing

Total nurse (weekend)
2.94
hrs / resident / day
RN (weekend)
0.32
hrs / resident / day
Total nurse (adjusted, weekend)
3.21
hrs / resident / day

Weekend under-staffing is a common quality-of-care concern — adverse events are more frequent when licensed coverage drops.

Staff turnover

Total nursing staff turnover
78.0%
annual
RN turnover
100.0%
annual
Administrators departed
1
last 12 months

Resident acuity

Nursing Case-Mix Index
1.25
higher acuity than avg
Case-Mix Index Ratio
0.91
facility / state ratio

Health Inspections

CMS weights three inspection cycles to compute the Health Inspection rating: the most recent (50%), the second most recent (33%), and the oldest (17%). Each standard-survey deficiency is assigned a score based on scope and severity; complaint-survey findings and revisit scores are added to produce the cycle total.

Cycle Date Total defs. Standard Complaint Deficiency score Revisits Total score
Cycle 1 (most recent) 2024-09-23 17 12 5 148 1 148
Cycle 2/3 (prior) 2023-08-07 9 9 2 64 1 64
Total weighted health score
127.0
lower is better
Infection-control citations
0
last cycle

Deficiencies (31)

Individual survey findings. Scope/severity uses the CMS A–L matrix: letters further down the alphabet indicate greater harm and wider scope, up through J–L (immediate jeopardy).

3 A/B/C No actual harm — minor
27 D/E/F Actual harm — potential for minor
1 G/H/I Actual harm
Tag Description Scope/Severity Survey date Corrected
0550 Honor the resident's right to a dignified existence, self-determination, communication, and to exercise his or her rights. D 2025-09-11 2025-09-15
0550 Honor the resident's right to a dignified existence, self-determination, communication, and to exercise his or her rights. E 2025-06-25 2025-07-09
0677 Provide care and assistance to perform activities of daily living for any resident who is unable. E 2025-06-25 2025-07-09
0725 Provide enough nursing staff every day to meet the needs of every resident; and have a licensed nurse in charge on each shift. F 2025-06-25 2025-07-09
0925 Make sure there is a pest control program to prevent/deal with mice, insects, or other pests. F 2025-05-01 2025-05-15
0550 Honor the resident's right to a dignified existence, self-determination, communication, and to exercise his or her rights. E 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0584 Honor the resident's right to a safe, clean, comfortable and homelike environment, including but not limited to receiving treatment and supports for daily living safely. E 2024-09-23 2024-10-11
0600 Protect each resident from all types of abuse such as physical, mental, sexual abuse, physical punishment, and neglect by anybody. D 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0609 Timely report suspected abuse, neglect, or theft and report the results of the investigation to proper authorities. D 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0622 Not transfer or discharge a resident without an adequate reason; and must provide documentation and convey specific information when a resident is transferred or discharged. G 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0623 Provide timely notification to the resident, and if applicable to the resident representative and ombudsman, before transfer or discharge, including appeal rights. D 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0661 Ensure necessary information is communicated to the resident, and receiving health care provider at the time of a planned discharge. D 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. D 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0692 Provide enough food/fluids to maintain a resident's health. D 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0808 Ensure therapeutic diets are prescribed by the attending physician and may be delegated to a registered or licensed dietitian, to the extent allowed by State law. D 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. F 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0912 Provide rooms that are at least 80 square feet per resident in multiple rooms and 100 square feet for single resident rooms. B 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0919 Make sure that a working call system is available in each resident's bathroom and bathing area. F 2024-09-23 2024-10-17
0550 Honor the resident's right to a dignified existence, self-determination, communication, and to exercise his or her rights. D 2023-08-07 2023-08-25
0609 Timely report suspected abuse, neglect, or theft and report the results of the investigation to proper authorities. D 2023-08-07 2023-08-25
0610 Respond appropriately to all alleged violations. D 2023-08-07 2023-08-25
0689 Ensure that a nursing home area is free from accident hazards and provides adequate supervision to prevent accidents. D 2023-08-07 2023-08-25
0725 Provide enough nursing staff every day to meet the needs of every resident; and have a licensed nurse in charge on each shift. F 2023-08-07 2023-08-25
0803 Ensure menus must meet the nutritional needs of residents, be prepared in advance, be followed, be updated, be reviewed by dietician, and meet the needs of the resident. E 2023-08-07 2023-08-25
0912 Provide rooms that are at least 80 square feet per resident in multiple rooms and 100 square feet for single resident rooms. C 2023-08-07 2023-08-25
0925 Make sure there is a pest control program to prevent/deal with mice, insects, or other pests. F 2023-08-07 2023-08-25
0677 Provide care and assistance to perform activities of daily living for any resident who is unable. D 2023-08-07 2023-08-25
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. D 2023-08-07 2023-08-25
0636 Assess the resident completely in a timely manner when first admitted, and then periodically, at least every 12 months. D 2022-09-09 2022-09-19
0812 Procure food from sources approved or considered satisfactory and store, prepare, distribute and serve food in accordance with professional standards. F 2022-09-09 2022-09-19
0912 Provide rooms that are at least 80 square feet per resident in multiple rooms and 100 square feet for single resident rooms. C 2022-09-09 2022-09-19
